summary: Comprehensive forensic audit of the Wincham Group's historical websites using the Internet Archive Wayback Machine. Covers 5 domains spanning 2008-2026, 963 archived snapshots, 18 evidential screenshots, and identifies key changes in language (avoid to mitigate), explicit Canary Islands/Spain marketing, qualification claims, IHT guarantee language, published Terms and Conditions duty of care, the 2016 Brexit negligent misstatement, and the expired SSL certificate on the live wincham.com site as of April 2026.
